productDisplayName: Wrangler Women's Pinstrupe Grey Melange T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey and white pinstriped t-shirt, made of 100% cotton with crossover V-neck and gathers below it, has short, mildly puffed sleevs and embroidered brandmark near left hemFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Indulge your feminine side with this soft grey and white pinstriped top from wrangler. The crossover paneled V-neck with mild gathers below it, coupled with the mildly puffed sleeves adds to the dainty look of this top.
